data.title: CDW’s ecommerce business grows as organizations invest in efficiency
data.description: For the first quarter of 2025, CDW reported net sales of $5.87 billion, a 6.4% increase compared to the same period last year.

data.title: Manhattan Associates rolls out tools to improve ERP order management
data.description: The application is intended to address operational inefficiencies without requiring companies to replace their existing ERP infrastructure.

data.title: Ralph Lauren appoints a global chief digital officer
data.description: Seshadri’s appointment as global CDO represents a key step forward in Ralph Lauren’s digital journey, positioning the brand to deliver enhanced consumer experiences and long-term, tech-enabled growth in an evolving retail landscape.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What may replace traditional search for a new generation of AI users
data.description: Agentic commerce announcements from Google, Perplexity and OpenAI show how AI search queries could evolve.

data.title: Freightos survey: Small importers still on edge despite tariff delay
data.description: While the panic seen in April has diminished, exhaustion has taken its place — signaling prolonged stress across the small importer segment.
